calendar.matters:
REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2251 35th Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94116)
Off Calendar Mar-27-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PTR-19-302616 Eleanor M. Ewing 1997 Revocable Trust and
PTR-19-302617 Eleanor M. Ewing Trust created under the Howard S. Ewing 1997 Trust.

Each Trust holds a 50% interest in the property. The sale was confirmed at $1,328,000.00 for 100% of the property based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed February 19, 2019. The Court granted the Petitions to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the orders). Bond is not required.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
